'''The Point''' was the southernmost cape of the largest island on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Spira/Legends|Spira]]. It was extremely dangerous waters to navigate, as two major [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] currents met there. Sailing the Point was considered to be a true test of seamanship, and the [[Spira Regatta Open]] included navigating the hazard as part of the race.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|The Spira Regatta|reprint=1}}
